title: Sri Chaitanya Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Sri Chaitanya Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sri Chaitanya Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Sri Chaitanya Capital India:
Sri Chaitanya Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya Capital India!
